list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM drive_state_classifications ORDER BY run_id DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id'
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT category) AS value FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id'
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT category) AS value FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT MAX(classified_at) AS value FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id'
targets.queryText: SELECT MAX(classified_at) AS value FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id'), 1) AS pct FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY category ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id'), 1) AS pct FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY category ORDER BY n DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(subcategory, '(none)') AS subcategory, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id' AND category = 'RUSTC_BITROT' GROUP BY subcategory ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(subcategory, '(none)') AS subcategory, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id' AND category = 'RUSTC_BITROT' GROUP BY subcategory ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT category, COALESCE(subcategory, '(none)') AS subcategory, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id' AND subcategory IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category, subcategory ORDER BY category, n DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT category, COALESCE(subcategory, '(none)') AS subcategory, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id' AND subcategory IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category, subcategory ORDER BY category, n DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT c.category, COALESCE(d.fat_image_tag, '(none)') AS fat_image, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state_classifications c JOIN drive_state d ON c.run_id = d.run_id AND c.candidate_key = d.candidate_key WHERE c.run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY c.category, d.fat_image_tag ORDER BY c.category, n DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT c.category, COALESCE(d.fat_image_tag, '(none)') AS fat_image, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state_classifications c JOIN drive_state d ON c.run_id = d.run_id AND c.candidate_key = d.candidate_key WHERE c.run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY c.category, d.fat_image_tag ORDER BY c.category, n DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT c.category, COALESCE(SUBSTR(d.commit_date, 1, 4), '????') AS year, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state_classifications c JOIN drive_state d ON c.run_id = d.run_id AND c.candidate_key = d.candidate_key WHERE c.run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY c.category, year ORDER BY c.category, year
targets.queryText: SELECT c.category, COALESCE(SUBSTR(d.commit_date, 1, 4), '????') AS year, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state_classifications c JOIN drive_state d ON c.run_id = d.run_id AND c.candidate_key = d.candidate_key WHERE c.run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY c.category, year ORDER BY c.category, year

targets.rawQueryText: WITH parsed AS (SELECT category, SUBSTR(candidate_key, 1, INSTR(candidate_key, '#') - 1) AS repo FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id') SELECT category, repo, COUNT(*) AS candidates FROM parsed GROUP BY category, repo HAVING candidates >= 3 ORDER BY category, candidates DESC
targets.queryText: WITH parsed AS (SELECT category, SUBSTR(candidate_key, 1, INSTR(candidate_key, '#') - 1) AS repo FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id') SELECT category, repo, COUNT(*) AS candidates FROM parsed GROUP BY category, repo HAVING candidates >= 3 ORDER BY category, candidates DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT classified_at, candidate_key, category, COALESCE(subcategory, '') AS subcategory, SUBSTR(COALESCE(evidence, ''), 1, 120) AS evidence FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id' ORDER BY classified_at DESC, candidate_key LIMIT 100
targets.queryText: SELECT classified_at, candidate_key, category, COALESCE(subcategory, '') AS subcategory, SUBSTR(COALESCE(evidence, ''), 1, 120) AS evidence FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id = '$run_id' ORDER BY classified_at DESC, candidate_key LIMIT 100
